ddls:
CREATE TABLE "monitoring_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the monitoring site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "state_code" INTEGER /* State code where the site is located */,
  "county_code" INTEGER /* County code where the site is located */,
  "cbsa_code" INTEGER /* CBSA code for metropolitan areas */,
  "cbsa_name" TEXT /* Name of the CBSA */,
  "site_elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the monitoring site */,
  "site_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the site */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of the site (e.g., urban, rural, industrial) */,
  "site_installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the site was installed */,
  "site_maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Maintenance schedule for the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollutants" (
  "pollutant_code" INTEGER /* Unique code identifying the pollutant */,
  "pollutant_desc" TEXT /* Description of the pollutant */,
  "pollutant_category" TEXT /* Category of the pollutant (e.g., particulate matter, gases) */,
  "pollutant_units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the pollutant */,
  "pollutant_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the pollutant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollutant_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "aqi_values" (
  "aqi_value" INTEGER /* AQI value range */,
  "aqi_category" TEXT /* Category of the AQI (e.g., Good, Moderate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the AQI category */,
  "aqi_category_color" TEXT /* Color associated with the AQI category for visualization */,
  "aqi_category_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the AQI category (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aqi_value")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_code" INTEGER /* Unique code for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "state_area" REAL /* Area of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_code" INTEGER /* Unique code for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_code" INTEGER /* State code where the county is located */,
  "county_population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "county_area" REAL /* Area of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "cbsa" (
  "cbsa_code" INTEGER /* Unique code for each CBSA */,
  "cbsa_name" TEXT /* Name of the CBSA */,
  "cbsa_population" INTEGER /* Population of the CBSA */,
  "cbsa_area" REAL /* Area of the CBSA */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cbsa_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, public) */,
  "user_full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the air quality data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_completeness" (
  "completeness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each completeness record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the air quality data entry */,
  "percent_complete" REAL /* Percentage of completeness of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated date for the completeness record */,
  "completeness_reason" TEXT /* Reason for data completeness or incompleteness */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("completeness_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the air quality data entry */,
  "assessment_score" REAL /* Score reflecting the quality of the data (on a defined scale) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments about the quality assessment */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the assessment was conducted */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person conducting the assessment */,
  "assessor_name" TEXT /* Name of the person conducting the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id")
)
